ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the contributor (e.g., Red Hat, Google, Self) */,
  "github_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the contributor's GitHub account */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the contributor's avatar */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief description of the contributor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the contributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contributor's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contributor's profile was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the contributor's profile */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the contributor's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation") REFERENCES organizations ("org_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the organization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry or sector in which the organization operates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization's record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the organization's record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the organization's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's source code repository */,
  "programming_languages" TEXT /* List of programming languages used in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project's record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor making the contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the contribution is associated with */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code added */,
  "lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code removed */,
  "changesets" INTEGER /* Number of changesets */,
  "percent_added" REAL /* Percentage of lines added */,
  "percent_removed" REAL /* Percentage of lines removed */,
  "percent_changesets" REAL /* Percentage of changesets */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the Git commit associated with the contribution */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the Git commit associated with the contribution */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series entry */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code added during the period */,
  "lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code removed during the period */,
  "changesets" INTEGER /* Number of changesets during the period */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the time series entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contribution */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the contribution */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the client accessing the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributors" (
  "project_contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-contributor relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor in the project (e.g., maintainer, contributor) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the contributor joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date when the contributor left the project (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
